direction_confidence_handling.confidence_2_guardrail: Confidence 2 samples must not be treated as identical to original metadata direction. If separation exists only in confidence 2 samples, treat it as weak and research-only.
direction_confidence_handling.phase_4_guardrail: If confidence 3 sensitivity does not support the same direction, do not proceed to Phase 4.

minimum_n_thresholds.no_exceptions: No confidence-stratum exception is allowed. With N <= 10 in any primary group, STRONG_DESCRIPTIVE_SEPARATION remains blocked.
minimum_n_thresholds.threshold_rule: if any primary group has N <= minimum_n_threshold

prior_validated_baseline_context.note: These are prior validated diagnostic context values only. This branch does not recompute outcomes or produce feature-vs-outcome statistics.

purpose: Pre-register how to compare GOOD_FAST_REACTION samples against FAST_FAILURE samples before any new analysis is executed.
